research_first.description: References >= 1 verified prospect-specific fact (recent achievement, public quote, named project, attributable source).

scoring.90_100: Multiple specific facts cited; sources verifiable; non-generic framing.
scoring.70_89: One strong specific fact; rest is reasonable framing.
scoring.50_69: Generic with one weak personalization (name + company only).

research_first.evidence_required: List the cited facts + source URLs

krite_pass.description: KRITE voice_score >= 75 on first review (no revision required).

scoring.50_84: Required one KRITE revision before passing.
scoring.0_49: Required >= 2 KRITE revisions OR was rejected outright.

krite_pass.evidence_required: KRITE verdict JSON for the send

response_rate_30d.description: Reply rate >= 8% over rolling 30 days for that send cohort.
response_rate_30d.evidence_required: Cohort send count + reply count from GHL conversations API

compliance.description: CASL footer present, opt-out path live, sender identity clear, no spam triggers.

scoring.75_99: All present but one weak (e.g., opt-out link valid but not prominent).
scoring.0_74: ANY missing element. AUTOMATIC FAIL ZONE.

voice_match.description: Reads as Marc / Alex / Ade persona consistently. No persona bleed.

scoring.70_89: Voice consistent with one minor tonal slip.
scoring.50_69: Voice mostly right but obvious AI tells.
scoring.0_49: Persona bleed (sounds like a different sender) OR generic AI voice.
